campaign.name: The Shattered Pact
campaign.description: An ancient pact between kingdoms shatters. One hero must navigate politics, war, and betrayal to forge a new age — or watch the realm burn.

nodes.description: Result of a combat action
Result of a social or negotiation action
Result of using items or spending gold
Result of a stealth or intelligence action
Result of a formal political maneuver
Player's physical condition
Whether the primary antagonist has been neutralized
How much key NPCs trust the player
The player's standing in the realm
The player's financial state
Quality and quantity of items
Loyalty of major factions to the player's cause
How much of the conspiracy the player has uncovered
State of the war between the kingdoms
State of the ancient pact
Act 1: Survive the ambush and reach the capital
Act 2: Expose the traitor within the council
Act 3: Prevent the assassination of the last loyal king
Act 4: Forge a new alliance across enemy lines
How the story ends

act1: The escort convoy is ambushed at the mountain pass. Crossbow bolts whistle through the night air.
Three survivors. The diplomatic documents are missing. Somewhere ahead lies Calder's Rest.
The village is occupied — soldiers bearing the wrong banner patrol the streets.
An old woman slips you a note: *'The council already knows you're coming.'*
The capital gates rise before you. The guards' eyes linger a moment too long.
Your quarters in the palace are too clean. Someone was here recently.
The first council session. Four faces watch you. One of them ordered the ambush.
act2: The archives contain gaps — specific dates excised from the record.
The spymaster is found dead. The scene was staged.
A messenger pigeon arrives for the wrong chamber.
The traitor's name sits at the edge of your knowledge, tantalizingly close.
A council vote is called. You must act before the session ends.
The confrontation. Evidence laid bare. The room holds its breath.
Chaos erupts. Loyalties are chosen tonight.
act3: Word comes — an assassin has entered the palace.
The loyal king is meeting with his advisors. You have minutes.
Three corridors. One assassin. Your choices narrow.
The throne room fills with screams or silence — depending on what you did.
In the aftermath, the shape of the war changes.
Old alliances crack. New ones are possible.
act4: The enemy emissary arrives under a white flag. They are frightened.
The ancient pact's original text is recovered from the ruins.
Three factions must each give something. None wants to go first.
A final ceremony on the border. The words of the new pact must be spoken.
The realm waits. This moment will be remembered or mourned for a generation.
act5: The threads of every choice you made converge here.
The realm remembers what you did — and what you did not do.
The Shattered Pact finds its ending.
